历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science/physics category were approximately 40435 → 59445 → 60728 → 56036 → 52584, with a significant backward shift of about 19000 places in 2022, fluctuating within the 52584–60728 range in the past three years, and a baseline of about 52584 in 2025, showing an overall backward trend; the university's planned enrollment in Shaanxi for science/physics category: 167 in 2021, 167 in 2022, 152 in 2023, 154 in 2024, 161 in 2025; planned enrollment of 207 in 2026, a significant expansion of about 28.6% compared to 2025, with a notable expansion rate, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in recent years, the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is approximately 127–136, ranking 131st in 2026, belonging to the mid-tier 211 level; the university has not appeared in recent reputation evaluations or abnormal filing documents, with a total Douyin popularity ranking of 72 and a rating of 'average', with no significant positive or negative public opinion events, and stable application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, no data on A- or above disciplines were collected, with missing information on advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, engineering majors (computer science, electronic information, electrical engineering) continue to be highly recommended, matching the university's science and engineering enrollment majors; Shaanxi's 2026 physics category candidates are about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, with a significant expansion in candidate scale, intensifying competition; Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, and recruits across provinces in Shaanxi, with no local enrollment preference; in recent years, the proportion of enrollment plans in Shaanxi is at a medium level among the university's national plans.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 52584, the significant expansion of about 28.6% in 2026 plans (easing competition) and the increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi physics category candidates (intensifying competition), the expansion rate is greater than the candidate growth rate, but the expansion of candidate scale still creates additional competitive pressure; considering stable reputation and engineering-oriented major popularity, it is expected that the lowest ranking in 2026 will shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted lowest ranking is about 61797, with a range of 61297–62297.
